{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/infrastructure-layer-b-en/09-what-industry-will-build.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "What Industry Will Likely Build"
tags:
  * architecture
  * anthropic
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. What Industry Will Likely Build


{quote}> Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — paper «Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work (EN)».{quote}

----





{quote}Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — paper «Infrastructure for AI-Collaborative Intellectual Work (EN)».{quote}

h2. What Industry Will Likely Build

Independent of what the author does, the industry will move 
toward Layer B infrastructure within 1-3 years. The gap is 
too obvious to remain unfilled.

Probable directions:

_Anthropic Projects expansion._ Projects will likely add 
some threading, document versioning, and richer organization. 
Anthropic is positioned to do this well because they 
control the AI integration tightly. Expect incremental 
additions to Projects functionality through 2026-2027.

_GitHub for ideas._ GitHub may build something parallel 
to GitHub for code — an intellectual workspace product. 
They have the infrastructure, the user base, and the 
brand. Risk: code culture would persist.

_Notion AI deepening._ Notion may extend Notion AI from 
generation assistance to genuine collaboration. They have 
the structural capacity (databases, linking, comments). 
Risk: Notion's complexity creates barrier to entry.

_Specialized startup._ Some new company may build Layer B 
specifically. This is the most likely path to genuinely 
new infrastructure but the highest risk.

_Open source community project._ Researchers and 
intellectual workers may build their own. Hypothes.is for 
annotations exists; could be extended. Discourse plus AI 
plugins. Various combinations.

We should not wait for any specific outcome. We should use 
what exists and adapt as better infrastructure emerges.

----



----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[282-what-industry-will-likely-build]]
* [[08-recursive-insight]]
* [[04-whats-missing-layer-b]]
* [[06-existing-approximations]]




----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[282-what-industry-will-likely-build]] (сходство 0.76)
* [[282-what-industry-will-likely-build]] (сходство 0.70)
* [[08-recursive-insight]] (сходство 0.25)
